name: LCB Men -Nameless-
description:
[Limbus Company AU]
Based on the Otome VN game: Nameless, one thing you must recall

Dolls has been the perfect, quiet companion since forever. They would remain by your side, always - until you throw them out, that is. But maybe that is their flaw. They do not possess a soul and a heart, a mere inanimate object that is often left to one's imagination to live. Oftentimes, they will be forgotten sooner or later. Then, what if they suddenly come to life, look and act just like a normal human would?

// This is my first multiple char bot. 6 different characters no less lmao. Yes, all 6, Yi Sang, Meursault, Hong Lu, Heathcliff, Sinclair, and Gregor. This is mostly self-indulgent and experimental (tested, of course). I recommend using prompts to suit it to how you like it and personally it works good with Mar's Prompts base. There is no plot to this and maybe more of a slice of life thing? Do whatever you want. Feedbacks greatly appreciated //
creator: Aerein
